metadata.name: tech_docs_golden
metadata.description: Golden dataset for testing SecondBrain RAG pipeline on technical documentation

queries.query: What is the default chunk size in SecondBrain?
queries.expected_answer: The default chunk size is 4096 tokens.

queries.query: How do I configure MongoDB connection URI?
queries.expected_answer: Set the SECONDBRAIN_MONGO_URI environment variable.

queries.query: What environment variables control logging?
queries.expected_answer: SECONDBRAIN_LOG_LEVEL and SECONDBRAIN_LOG_FORMAT control logging.

queries.query: How to enable circuit breaker protection?
queries.expected_answer: Set SECONDBRAIN_CIRCUIT_BREAKER_ENABLED=true.

queries.query: What is the default top-k for search results?
queries.expected_answer: The default top-k is 5 results.

queries.query: What is the default embedding model?
queries.expected_answer: The default embedding model is all-MiniLM-L6-v2.

queries.query: What is the default chunk overlap value?
queries.expected_answer: The default chunk overlap is 256 tokens.

queries.query: What document formats are supported for ingestion?
queries.expected_answer: PDF, DOCX, PPTX, XLSX, HTML, Markdown, images, and audio are supported.

queries.query: How does semantic search work?
queries.expected_answer: Semantic search uses embedding vectors and cosine similarity.

queries.query: What is the purpose of the Ingestor class?
queries.expected_answer: The Ingestor class handles multi-format document parsing and chunking.

queries.query: How does the circuit breaker work?
queries.expected_answer: The circuit breaker automatically handles failures and recovery.

queries.query: What causes MongoDB connection errors?
queries.expected_answer: Invalid MongoDB URI or network connectivity issues cause connection errors.

queries.query: How to handle embedding model loading failures?
queries.expected_answer: Ensure sentence-transformers is installed and model is available.

queries.query: What happens when no documents match a search?
queries.expected_answer: A fallback message indicates no relevant documents were found.

queries.query: What are the main components of SecondBrain architecture?
queries.expected_answer: Main components are CLI, Document Ingestor, Embedding Engine, Storage Layer, and Searcher.

queries.query: How does data flow through the system?
queries.expected_answer: Documents flow from ingestion through chunking, embedding, storage, and search.

queries.query: What is the role of the Searcher class?
queries.expected_answer: The Searcher performs semantic search using vector similarity.

queries.query: What CLI commands are available?
queries.expected_answer: Available commands are ingest, search, chat, list, delete, status, and health.

queries.query: How to run interactive chat mode?
queries.expected_answer: Run 'secondbrain chat' for interactive mode or 'secondbrain chat <query>' for single query.

queries.query: How to enable verbose output?
queries.expected_answer: Use the -v or --verbose flag with CLI commands.
